entries.sourceQuote: Are you a current medical student at UAB looking to travel abroad to expand your international medical knowledge?
entries.rationale: A3 downgrade: Quote 'Are you a current medical student at UAB looking to travel abroad...' is about OUTBOUND UAB students, not inbound USCE visitors. Not a USCE offer at all; classified MISSING_FIELD lane bidirectional.
